author: Jason Heddings
description: Organize your Obsidian attachments automatically. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Jason Heddings
manifest.description: Automatically organize your attachments into a checksum-based folder hierarchy.
manifest.name: Folderize

name: Folderize

* Command to organize files.
* Remove empty folders.
* Watch specified folder for new files.
